name: Wien's displacement law
task: Create /tmp/eval_wien/wien.py with wien_peak_wavelength(temperature_k) returning the peak wavelength in meters: λ_peak = b / T where b ≈ 2.897771955e-3 m·K. Raise ValueError if T <= 0.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_wien/wien.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); W = mod.wien_peak_wavelength; assert abs(W(5778) - 5.014e-7) < 1e-9
try: W(0)
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
